title: helmia brachycarpa
intro: Hemia brachycarpa, also known as the Indian pennywort, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
